meaning: n.娴峰啗涓婂皢,鑸伴槦鍙镐护,鏃楄埌
examples: He was handpicked for this job by the Admiral.
The admiral visited the ships under his command.
He abused the Admiral in the grossest terms.
When TV came along, such stocks as Admiral, Zenith, DuMont and RCA were hot.
We reached the admiral barely a day into his new job in a command center trailer.
